M-067.NAME: bimi-sender-branding
M-067.owns: Public BIMI SVG asset delivery for KrotPN sender-branding DNS records.
M-067.purpose: Expose a BIMI-compliant KrotPN logo over HTTPS so mailbox providers can discover sender branding through the operator-managed BIMI DNS record.

exports.asset-bimi-logo: Serve the KrotPN BIMI SVG at /.well-known/bimi/krotpn.svg from the user frontend static build.
exports.rule-well-known-bimi: Allow only the BIMI well-known path before the frontend hidden-file deny rule.
exports.smoke-phase49-bimi-branding: Validate SVG Tiny P/S structure, file size, unsafe SVG absence, nginx allow-rule, and DNS/live instructions.

constraints.constraint-1: Do not change Resend request payloads, provider API keys, verification/reset token handling, or EMAIL_FROM semantics.
constraints.constraint-2: Do not change install.sh, deploy scripts, docker-compose, RU/DE routing, TLS material, or MTProto/VPN runtime topology during Phase-49 planning/execution.
constraints.constraint-3: The SVG must stay under 32 kilobytes, be square, include title/desc, set version="1.2" and baseProfile="tiny-ps", and avoid scripts, animation, external references, raster images, and root x/y attributes.
constraints.constraint-4: The public URL must return the SVG itself with image/svg+xml over HTTPS; HTML SPA fallback or hidden-file denial is a verification failure.
constraints.constraint-5: Mailbox rendering is provider-side; KrotPN can publish the BIMI asset and DNS instructions but cannot force Gmail, Apple, Yahoo, or other providers to display the avatar.

acceptance-metrics.metric-1: frontend/public/.well-known/bimi/krotpn.svg is included in the frontend production build and remains BIMI Tiny P/S compliant.
acceptance-metrics.metric-2: frontend/nginx.conf allows /.well-known/bimi/krotpn.svg before the generic hidden-file deny rule while keeping other hidden files denied.
acceptance-metrics.metric-3: Phase-49 smoke fails on missing tiny-ps/version attributes, oversize SVG, unsafe SVG constructs, missing .well-known allow-rule, or protected deploy/install changes.
acceptance-metrics.metric-4: Operator DNS instructions use default._bimi.krotpn.xyz TXT with v=BIMI1 and l=https://krotpn.xyz/.well-known/bimi/krotpn.svg; a= remains omitted until VMC/CMC exists.

verification-design.evidence-level-1: Static SVG inspection checks file size, root attributes, title/desc, forbidden tags/attributes, and no external references.
verification-design.evidence-level-2: Frontend build and nginx static review prove the asset is copied and the well-known route is not blocked by the hidden-file deny location.
verification-design.evidence-level-3: Optional live smoke verifies curl -I returns 200 and image/svg+xml at https://krotpn.xyz/.well-known/bimi/krotpn.svg after clean deploy.

M-067.hotspot: H-054: BIMI sender branding depends on strict SVG Tiny P/S compliance, public HTTPS delivery, DMARC enforcement, and mailbox-provider rendering policy outside the Resend send API
